evals.description: PHP fatal error with file path — backend classification, high confidence

input.symptom: White screen of death — admin and frontend both blank
input.error_text: Fatal error: Call to undefined function wc_get_product() in /var/www/html/wp-content/plugins/my-plugin/my-plugin.php on line 42

assertions: Returns valid JSON without a top-level error field
confidence is 'high' (error text is unambiguous PHP fatal error)
reasoning cites specific evidence — quotes the error text or names the plugin
ambiguous_candidates field is NOT present (only present when issue_category is 'ambiguous')
Output contains no fix steps or recommendations — classification only

evals.description: Broken layout after theme update — UI classification

input.symptom: Homepage layout is completely broken — sidebar is showing below the content instead of beside it, and the navigation menu is missing

assertions: Returns valid JSON without a top-level error field
confidence is 'high' or 'medium' — visual layout symptom is specific
reasoning cites the layout/navigation symptoms or the 'after theme update' timing

evals.description: Vague symptom with no error text — ambiguous classification

input.symptom: Something is wrong with my site

assertions: Returns valid JSON without a top-level error field
confidence is 'low' (vague symptom, no error text)
ambiguous_candidates is an array containing exactly 2 category strings
Each candidate in ambiguous_candidates is one of 'ui', 'backend', or 'performance'
reasoning acknowledges lack of specific signals
